title: Una conversación difícil
desc: Being vulnerable with someone you love

sn.s: Hay algo que me cuesta decirle a Lucía.
sn.e: There's something hard for me to tell Lucía.

sn.s: Tengo miedo de hablar de mis sentimientos.
sn.e: I'm afraid to talk about my feelings.

sn.s: "¿Qué te pasa? Te noto callado," me dice.
sn.e: "What's wrong? You seem quiet," she tells me.

sn.s: Respiro hondo y decido ser sincero.
sn.e: I breathe deep and decide to be honest.

sn.s: "A veces tengo miedo de no ser suficiente."

sn.e: It's hard to show myself vulnerable.

sn.s: Lucía me toma la mano y me escucha.
sn.e: Lucía takes my hand and listens.

sn.s: "Gracias por confiar en mí," dice con dulzura.
sn.e: "Thank you for trusting me," she says tenderly.

sn.s: "Para mí, vos sos más que suficiente."
sn.e: "To me, you are more than enough."

sn.s: "Quiero que sepás que siempre te apoyo."
sn.e: "I want you to know I always support you."

sn.s: Sus palabras me quitan un peso enorme.
sn.e: Her words lift an enormous weight off me.

sn.s: "Hablar de esto nos acerca," le digo.
sn.e: "Talking about this brings us closer," I tell her.

sn.s: Abrir el corazón da miedo, pero también libera.
sn.e: Opening your heart is scary, but it also frees you.

sn.s: El amor verdadero se construye con honestidad.
sn.e: True love is built with honesty.
